email_body:
Beste,

Met veel enthousiasme reageer ik op de vacature voor Logistiek medewerker bij Chapeau. Uw warme familiebedrijf en focus op luxueuze tuinmeubelen spreken mij aan.

Ik heb ervaring in logistiek (Katoen Natie) en in orderopvolging en klantcommunicatie via mijn digitale marketingwerk. Bij Episto volg ik online bestellingen op, beheer ik voorraad en communiceer ik met klanten en leveranciers. Ik ben vlot met computers en leer snel nieuwe systemen.

Ik spreek Nederlands (B1, in opleiding), Engels en Turks. Ik woon in Zwijndrecht en ben flexibel inzetbaar.

Graag licht ik mijn motivatie toe in een gesprek.

Met vriendelijke groeten,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the Logistics Employee position at Chapeau. Your warm family business and focus on luxury garden furniture appeal to me.

I have experience in logistics (Katoen Natie) and in order processing and customer communication through my digital marketing work. At Episto, I follow up online orders, manage inventory, and communicate with customers and suppliers. I am computer-savvy and quick to learn new systems.

I speak Dutch (B1, currently studying), English, and Turkish. I live in Zwijndrecht and am flexible.

I would be happy to discuss my motivation in an interview.

Kind regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Beste,

Toen ik de vacature voor Logistiek medewerker bij Chapeau las, voelde ik meteen een klik. Uw bedrijf straalt warmte en kwaliteit uit – precies de werkomgeving waarin ik wil groeien.

Mijn achtergrond combineert logistieke ervaring met digitale vaardigheden. Bij Katoen Natie werkte ik in een hoogvolume magazijn, waar ik leerde accuraat en efficiënt te werken. Bij Episto, als junior digital marketer, ben ik verantwoordelijk voor orderopvolging, voorraadbeheer en klantcommunicatie – taken die naadloos aansluiten bij deze functie. Ik controleer bestellingen, plan leveringen en zorg dat klanten en het team goed geïnformeerd zijn.

Ik ben sterk met computers en pas me snel aan nieuwe systemen aan. Mijn ervaring met contentmanagementsystemen en data-analysetools helpt me om processen te optimaliseren. Daarnaast spreek ik Nederlands (B1, in opleiding), Engels en Turks, wat handig is voor internationale klanten.

Wat mij aanspreekt in Chapeau is de huiselijke sfeer en de ruimte om initiatief te nemen. Ik wil graag bijdragen aan de vlotte dagelijkse werking tussen webshop, magazijn en klant. Ik ben leergierig, flexibel en klaar om me volledig in te zetten.

Ik hoop mijn motivatie in een persoonlijk gesprek verder toe te lichten.

Met vriendelijke groeten,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear,

When I read the vacancy for Logistics Employee at Chapeau, I felt an immediate connection. Your company radiates warmth and quality – exactly the work environment where I want to grow.

My background combines logistics experience with digital skills. At Katoen Natie, I worked in a high-volume warehouse, learning to be accurate and efficient. At Episto, as a junior digital marketer, I am responsible for order processing, inventory management, and customer communication – tasks that align seamlessly with this role. I check orders, plan deliveries, and ensure customers and the team are well informed.

I am strong with computers and adapt quickly to new systems. My experience with content management systems and data analysis tools helps me optimize processes. Additionally, I speak Dutch (B1, currently studying), English, and Turkish, which is useful for international customers.

What appeals to me about Chapeau is the homely atmosphere and the room to take initiative. I want to contribute to the smooth daily operation between webshop, warehouse, and customer. I am eager to learn, flexible, and ready to fully commit.

I hope to further explain my motivation in a personal conversation.

Kind regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
Ervaring in logistiek (Katoen Natie) en orderopvolging (Episto)
Vlot met computers en snel weg met nieuwe systemen
Ervaring met klantcommunicatie en leveringsplanning
Nederlands B1 (in opleiding), Engels en Turks
Flexibel, leergierig en woonachtig in Zwijndrecht
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in web design, SEO, and GEO, and hands-on experience in logistics and order processing. At Episto, I manage online orders, inventory, and customer communication while also handling on-page SEO and WordPress site maintenance. Previously worked in a high-volume warehouse at Katoen Natie, ensuring accuracy and efficiency. Quick to learn new systems and tools, with strong computer skills. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: B1, currently taking classes to improve further.

CORE SKILLS
- Order processing & follow-up: online orders, collections, delivery planning
- Inventory management: incoming deliveries, stock control
- Customer communication: service questions, afterservice, team coordination
- Computer skills: quick to learn new systems, CMS, analytics tools
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1)
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Social: social media content & integration

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
